Hey everybody, Jordan Belfort here and welcome to StraightLine Persuasion Fast Track, the ultimate sales system for achieving massive results in sales in the shortest time possible. Now the StraightLine system has been my invention here for over 25 years now and represents a real world business experience starting on Wall Street and then going into just about every business industry you can possibly imagine from offline to online, from the auto industry to real estate to stocks and bonds and everything in between. And basically the system is really incredibly powerful and the problem I originally had is that when I invented the StraightLine system I didn't put the necessary ethics behind it. And without ethics and integrity the ability to get people to do things they shouldn't do and buy things they shouldn't buy, which the StraightLine system can give you is a very, very dangerous thing. So I urge you as you go through this training and you become even reasonably efficient at the StraightLine, you'll see just how powerful it truly is. And I cost you and I urge you to really stick to the StraightNarrow here when it comes to ethics and integrity. And that really means in my book making sure that you're only getting people to do things that they should be doing and buying things that they should be buying. See at the highest level what sales really is, is helping people overcome the barriers and the obstacles that stop them from taking actions that they should be taking. It's not about just shoving things down people's throat to make a commission. Now when I first invented the StraightLine system I was only 25 years old. I was a really young guy and I wanted to be really, really rich. And I lacked the discipline to really restrain myself, to really understand the damage that you can inflict on other people and ultimately the damage that you do to yourself and the people around you when you don't maintain your ethics and integrity. See with the StraightLine it's not just about that you can get people to buy things they shouldn't buy. You can also get them to buy more of what they should buy. So it might make sense for them to buy a little bit of something. You end up wanting to shove a whole truckload down their throat just to make a commission. And again I caution you, I urge you not to take that road. You have to take the high road here. It's got to be about centering yourself on doing the right thing, getting the client what they need and what helps them resolve their pain. We'll get into that in this training about resolving people's pain. So then you get what you want, of course, which is your commission and long-term relationships and referrals. So now what I found with the StraightLine system very quickly back in 1988 is I could take any human being, regardless of their age, their race, their creed, their color, their socioeconomic background, their educational status. I could take any person and literally in a couple of weeks using the StraightLine system, turn them into a world-class closer. And in my book, what that means is being able to close anyone who's closeable. Now that doesn't mean you close everybody because there are some people who shouldn't be closed, people who don't qualify for your product. They can't be helped by your product. So we don't want to close everybody. And also some people just literally can't be closed. They just have these limiting buying weeks. We'll get to that later with the training and we can overcome a lot of that, but sometimes you just can't. So I don't want to set up an unrealistic expectation here. But when I say close anyone who's close, but what I mean is that when you're done and let's say the person doesn't buy from you, you don't walk away saying, damn, Jordan could have got the person or my sales manager could have gotten the person. I want you to say, you know what, they didn't buy from me, but they wouldn't have bought from anybody. That's the power of the StraightLine system. To get you to that point, we have such confidence that you just know before you even go into the encounter that if the person's closeable, you got what it takes to close them. And again, I'm focusing on closing it because it's a very closing centric system. It's about making the deal. And one of the great misconceptions with selling and the ability to close is not just about the tangible. You're selling a car or an insurance product or a piece of real estate, whatever you might be selling. It's also about your ideas, your concepts, your vision for the future. See those things, if you're an entrepreneur or a business owner or just a success-oriented person who wants to really just improve their lives and live a life of power, meaning to be able to look at the world and say, okay, it's a certain way right now. And I want to make the world a better way for myself and also to empower people around me. It starts with your ability to have a vision for your future and also learn how to share or sell that vision to other people in a way that movies can take action to essentially roll this and get involved in what you're doing. Because again, we're not usually one person, always takes a team effort here. And I will tell you this in my life, people always say, you know, Jordan, you've always been able to come back from failure in this great cataclysm. So you guys, I'm sure you saw the movie, right? The Wolf of Wall Street and you saw there really firsthand what a lack of ethics can do for you. But then you also watched how I was able to come back from all that. And at the heart of that ability to essentially come back from failure, to essentially look at your life the way it is. Say, you know what? I want a better life for myself, my family. It starts with your ability to close the deal. And that's why this is really a closing based system. That being said, with the straight line, you'll also be able to shorten your sale cycle, qualify far more effectively, meaning learn to weed out your prospects. You'll learn how to get into rapport like that, both on a conscious and unconscious level and also develop a massive stream of customer referrals and develop customers for life. That's what the straight line system is all about. So I'm really honored. I feel privileged, in fact, to be able to share the system today, this sort of fast track, this way to really get started with the straight line. It's an introductory course here. And of course, you know, I have the higher level course for people who really want to take this to the next level. But this is going to give you the basics. The building blocks that you could start moving forward now and start increasing your closing rate and essentially making more money, living a more empowered life. Bottom line. So in the straight line persuasion fast track course, what I'm going to do is introduce you to some of the most powerful parts of the straight line system. Now again, I can't teach you everything because there's a much more immersive step by step format, which I do in my comprehensive straight line persuasion training program. But what I can give you here is a very in depth overview of what the system is about and give you some very powerful nuggets that you can use to immediately start closing more sales. So here's how it's going to work. Every week for the next four weeks, you're going to get an email from me with another module and each module have first a short introductory video for me, like the one you're watching right now. Then you'll get a chapter or two, depending on how long the chapter is of my straight line persuasion ebook, which by the way, no one has seen yet. It's brand new. I'm actually writing it as we speak and it's totally, totally awesome. You're going to love it. So you're going to get about one or two chapters a week, depending on the length of the chapter. And then three, I'm going to give you a video from one of my live trainings where I'm drilling down one of the key elements from the straight line persuasion system that you just went through in the ebook. And then fourth, you're going to get a worksheet to help you out and implement and take action and really allow you to essentially apply what you've learned in your own business. Now, again, I just want you to understand the reason I'm spreading this out over four weeks is because it's a very powerful concept of learning called spaced repetition. What that means is I teach you something. I let you actually go out and use it for a week and then you get to have it. I'm going to refresh it the next week and then bam, I give you something else to learn. This stops from going to this place of complete overwhelm where I just unload the whole system on you at once and you might pick up a couple of nuggets, but the greater meaning will get lost. That's why I'm going to split this up into four weeks so we can take advantage of the power of spaced repetition. Now in terms of the ebook, which is really the basis for this entire course, I did something really, really cool here and it actually created a fictitious narrator, a guy called Lucas Stone who's a journalist. And it's based on someone I know who I had actually come and interview me and download the straight line system in the form of an interview. The way I figured it, the best way for me to teach the straight line system in the book was to actually have myself interviewed by someone who's an expert at asking questions and have them essentially dig and dig and dig until they uncover the deepest levels of the straight line system. So I actually went and hired some guys or a top journalist, an investigative reporter who's an expert at asking questions in a specific way to dig to the truth. And we sat there for about four weeks and I literally downloaded the straight line system in an interview form and then I took that and I rewrote it myself in my own kind of wolf-like language pattern. So it's funny, it's exciting, it's cool, but most of all it is incredibly empowering. When you read this book, I promise you this because I put a ton of effort into making sure that every paragraph, every syllable, every sentence flow just the right way. You're going to hear my voice in this ebook and you'll get to understand the true power of how the straight line system was first developed, how I put it together piece by piece, how it evolved over time, and then how in 2008 when I actually went out and started teaching the straight line system again after the whole first cataclysm, you'll see exactly how I actually went through the system line by line through the actual code of the straight line and I rewrote some of the code to make sure that every last aspect of the system was scrubbed for the highest level of ethics and integrity. And what happened is, believe it or not, is the system became even more powerful. See when I reviewed it again in 2000 and it took everything I ever taught and I really just went step by step myself and I started getting new ideas and things with the internet and how to apply certain marketing strategies to the straight line and realizing the power of some of the things I was doing verbally, how to use that in email. How do you essentially take the straight line, so to write straight line emails and there's just so much cool stuff in this book that when you use it the way I've created here, by the way, I didn't do it myself. If you're already good, you know you're closing some deals, you're going to become great. Now they know consciously why they're so successful. They can bring their best to the game every single day. So that's the goal of the system here. So essentially sales is basically the key to the kingdom for achieving massive wealth and success, the so-called X factor if you will that allows you to really go into any business or take any idea that you have any concept and actually monetize it, turn it into a functioning business and entity that makes you money and allows you essentially to have the life that you always want. See one of the things I always see is that when people talk about they want to make money and they want to get rich, they never really take you to the next level up which is really why do they want to get rich, why do they want to make money and I want you as we go through this, focusing in on really your why, what truly at the highest level motivates you and makes you want to do the things that you got to do every single day. So you very often with success in business and in all aspects of life it's about doing the things that you know you got to do but sometimes you just don't feel like doing and selling is one of those things when people have a negative anchor that thinks selling is evil or selling is manipulative and let me just say bottom line here, selling is everything in life. Either you're selling or you're failing. You're selling people that your ideas make sense, that your concepts make sense, you're selling your kids to make their beds, to do their homework, you might be a teacher selling your kids on the value of an education, it could be a pastor selling this congregation on the values of whatever the religion is, it could be a politician trying to sell his constituency, it doesn't really matter, it just cuts through to every aspect of life. And again it's really at the highest level and I've said this, I'm going to just drive this point home, it's about helping people essentially make decisions that they should be making and ultimately it empowers them, it allows them to get what they want in life and then as a result of that it allows you to get what you want to. That's really what I call ethical persuasion. One of the great people in this world that I consider a mentor is Warren Buffett and when you look at Warren Buffett you say financial guru, second rich, third richest man in the world, whichever year it happens to be and you look at Warren Buffett and you wouldn't really say well Warren Buffett is a salesman or an expert at influence but I'll tell you this, there's a great clip that you might want to go check out on YouTube, it's Warren Buffett giving a talk with Bill Gates to about I think 500 or 1000 people, I think it's a Columbia University and he's answering all their questions for these kids that are about to go into the business world and one of the questions he gets asked relate to how can we improve our worth in the marketplace and Warren Buffett said one of the most profound things I've ever heard, he said listen right now he's speaking to a girl specifically who asked the question, he goes you're an asset right now and I'm paraphrasing here, he goes let's say you're a million dollar asset right now, you'll make an X amount of money over the next couple of years, whatever how many years it is, he goes I'll pay you right now, I'll give you 100,000 up front for 10% of you because you're an asset, I'll buy part of this asset, however if you want to become more valuable go out and take a course in persuasion, influence and communication and I'll pay you 150,000 because you'll become 50% more valuable and then he goes on to say that he himself was going out into the workforce, he knew we had this knack for picking stocks and analyzing companies but he was aware that no matter how great he was at that, no matter how well he could manage other people's money, if he wasn't able to verbalize that, to share that vision with other people in a way that made them trust him and give him a shot and hand over some money to Warren Buffett, he would have just been a very small no name money manager so what Warren Buffett went out and did is he took a course in sales and persuasion, now back in the day it was Dale Carnegie in the 50s, that was the gold standard, now things like you know Hattie and Shake Hands right and look people in the eye and say their name eight times, it's kind of cliche, we live in a different world where people are far more on the ball, they understand the basic sales stuff and that's really why the straight line system has become really you know so much in demand around the world in all these different industries because it cuts to really the heart of both logical and emotional influence at the highest level and it's not about cheap sales tricks or saying people's names again or it's not like that at all, it's basically core influencing strategies that from today to the end of time they're always going to work because it just cuts to logical needs, it cuts to emotional needs and it cuts to the highest level about moving people from a place of relative uncertainty to a place of absolute certainty, well they say to themselves you know what I want to do this, I feel logically it makes sense it all adds up and I also emotionally can feel the benefits, I can actually imagine myself in the future having bought this product, taken advantage of the benefits, having my pain resolved and feeling good, that's what the straight line system is truly all about about showing you how to get some person that you know whatever your industry is, whatever the business is, is taking a person who's somewhat uncertain about what you have to offer and showing in a very non-pressure way you know no high pressure showing them really step by step why they really should be absolutely positively certain that what you have is truly going to help them in every way possible and that you're a person yourself worth trusting, your company behind you again is one of ethics and integrity so all these things that have to be rolled up in a presentation the straight line shows you what to do first, what to do second, much knows my story but I want to just give you some of the sort of the high points and some of the low points here so you understand how the straight line system got started where it went wrong took a left turn Albuquerque is the phrase goes and how I was able to really get it back on track and how since I started teaching this again I've been able to take people from all over the world from pretty much every industry you can imagine and really you turn them into world-class closers and take people who are just you know young budding entrepreneurs as well as seasoned business owners and really help them grow their businesses dramatically using this X factor of sales persuasion and influence so real quick you know it started the straight line system out of necessity they say that you know necessity is the mother of invention well in this case the necessity happened because I stumbled upon an untapped niche in the stock market which was selling five dollar stocks to the richest one percent of Americans now at the time no one ever tried it for whatever reason and I was doing it and I had my junior partner Danny who was played by Jonah Hill in the Wolf of Wall Street movie a wild man right but a great sales person I had trained Danny this is pretty straight line I trained him how to close rich people over the film so basically I could do it and Danny could do it but my 12 guys they were probably around Forrest Gump when it comes to IQ they weren't that smart these guys right very young uneducated you know no members of the Lucky sperm club there they were just these average kids from Long Island who never thought they'd be rich never grew up with empowering beliefs their teachers told them they'd be averaged their parents told them they'd be average so they never really had this this ability this inside their own force to be able to harness this force of greatness and I could not get these guys to close rich people and I tried everything and even back then in 1988 I was considered to be one of the top sales trainers out there anywhere on Wall Street had a reputation for you know being able to give great meetings and motivate people but without the straight line system I could not get these guys over the hump and then one night I actually stumbled upon this this way of essentially explaining a sale in a linear fashion as a straight line when I uttered those words you know every sale is the same it's a straight line bam that was it and what unfolded but essentially came out of me over the next few months as I really just invented the system was something that became so powerful and effective that literally I took all these kids and within you know a matter of weeks they became world-class closers they all became millionaires and the rest you've probably seen in the movie now my mistake of course was I did not have the discipline to ground the system in ethics and integrity in other words I used it just simply to close anyone I could not really caring if the product was up to snuff if the people could benefit from the product and that's really where I went wrong bottom line and because of that I was forced to start over I guess that's good for a lot of people who are watching this tape right now because it's really allowed me to go out there and spread this throughout the world and over the last you know five years I've taught this to some of the largest most successful corporations on the planet I've taught the system to average moms and pops young entrepreneurs business owners you name and I've taught it to people in every industry in every country and I get about 10 or 15 emails per day on Facebook and on my wall where people you know I've been through the system or I've been through one of my seminars and it's ability to make the world the way they want it and by having that power and grounding it with ethics and integrity so you're helping people as well along the way you could end up using the straight line system to live the life of your dreams and that is truly my dream for you so again I'm honored I'm privileged to be able to be teaching this this fast track straight line persuasion course here
